title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: WATERFALL COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER NORTH BEND HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides annual exams, gynecological exams, care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing and family planning, STI testing, immunizations, sports physicals, mental health evaluations and counseling. 1890 Waite Street Suite 1 North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm Email (541) 756-6232 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 756-6232 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Limited walk-in for urgent care. FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Douglas Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WATERFALL COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER NORTH BEND
